chapter_title.en: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)

text: 5888 - وَ قَالَ نَبِيُّ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "بَادِرُوا إِلَى رِيَاضِ اَلْجَنَّةِ " قَالُوا يَا رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ وَ مَا رِيَاضُ اَلْجَنَّةِ قَالَ "حَلَقُ اَلذِّكْرِ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5888 - The Prophet of Allah (swt), peace be upon him and his family, said:
"Hasten towards the gardens of Paradise."
They asked: "O' Messenger of Allah (swt), what are the gardens of Paradise?"
Prophet (sw) replied: "The gatherings of remembrance (of Allah (swt))."
